input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A tilted shot shows a snowy forest with tall evergreens and frosted undergrowth. The ground is covered in deep white snow. Thin, frost-covered branches are visible in the foreground. In the second frame, a figure dressed in dark clothing becomes visible in the lower left corner, walking near the tree line.</think><answer></answer>

input.user_input: Describe the visual progression of the video, noting specific changes in camera angle and subject appearance with timestamps.

samples.output: <think>The camera continues its upward tilt, focusing entirely on the dense canopy of tall evergreen trees. Branches heavily coated in white frost and snow dominate the frame against a pale, overcast sky. The perspective shifts slightly right, revealing more intricate details of the frozen foliage high above the forest floor.</think><answer>From 0 to 2 seconds, a tilted shot reveals a snowy forest with a dark-clad figure appearing briefly. Between 2 and 4 seconds, the camera tilts upward, shifting focus from the ground to snow-laden evergreen canopies and large trunks. From 4 to 6 seconds, the angle steepens sharply, excluding the ground entirely to show vertical trunks against a bright sky. Finally, from 6 to 10 seconds, the view remains skyward, rotating slowly to frame the overcast sky through high, frost-covered branches.</answer>

metadata.gold_answer: From 0 to 2 seconds, a tilted shot reveals a snowy forest with a dark-clad figure appearing briefly. Between 2 and 4 seconds, the camera tilts upward, shifting focus from the ground to snow-laden evergreen canopies and large trunks. From 4 to 6 seconds, the angle steepens sharply, excluding the ground entirely to show vertical trunks against a bright sky. Finally, from 6 to 10 seconds, the view remains skyward, rotating slowly to frame the overcast sky through high, frost-covered branches.
metadata.canonical_answer: At 0s, the camera moves through a snow-covered forest with tall trees; at 4s, the view tilts upward to show frost-covered branches; at 8s, the sky becomes visible through the canopy gaps; at 16s, a man wearing a red plaid jacket appears on screen.

queries.question: Describe the visual progression of the video, noting specific changes in camera angle and subject appearance with timestamps.

answers.text: From 0 to 2 seconds, a tilted shot reveals a snowy forest with a dark-clad figure appearing briefly. Between 2 and 4 seconds, the camera tilts upward, shifting focus from the ground to snow-laden evergreen canopies and large trunks. From 4 to 6 seconds, the angle steepens sharply, excluding the ground entirely to show vertical trunks against a bright sky. Finally, from 6 to 10 seconds, the view remains skyward, rotating slowly to frame the overcast sky through high, frost-covered branches.

From 12 to 14 seconds, the camera maintains a steep upward angle, panning across frozen branches against an overcast sky. Between 14 and 16 seconds, the view tilts downward, bringing dark tree trunks back into focus. As the snowy ground reappears, a small yellow sign becomes visible nestled among the frosted undergrowth in the lower right, marking a distinct shift from the previous skyward perspective.

queries.question: Which entity appearing after the initial tree shots is still on screen in the final segment? A. pale blue sky with soft white clouds B. thick dark brown tree trunks C. man with short dark hair, beard, wearing a white turtleneck sweater and a red and orange plaid coat D. tall evergreen trees with dark green needles heavily coated in white frost and snow

answers.text: C

queries.question: Did the video feature BOTH a yellow sign on a post AND a man wearing a red plaid jacket? A. Only the man wearing a red plaid jacket B. Both the yellow sign on a post and the man wearing a red plaid jacket C. Only the yellow sign on a post D. Neither the yellow sign nor the man wearing a red plaid jacket

answers.text: B

[6-12] The perspective faces almost directly skyward, framing a bright overcast sky with dark, frost-covered evergreen canopies that rotate slightly, highlighting the intricate frozen foliage high above. [12-16] The camera gazes upward at tall evergreen trees heavily coated in white frost against a pale sky, then tilts down to reveal dark trunks, a snowy forest floor, and a small yellow sign. [16-18] A man with short dark hair and a beard appears in the bottom left, wearing a red jacket over a white turtleneck. [18-20] He centers in the frame, wearing a thick red and orange plaid coat with snowflakes on his shoulders, standing on a snowy path surrounded by frosted trees. [20-22] He turns his face left and closes his eyes. [22-26] He opens his eyes, looks directly at the camera with his mouth open mid-speech, and raises his right hand in a gesture while snow rests

[70-78] A man in a red and orange plaid coat over a white turtleneck stands on a snowy path, dropping his arms and looking left before walking toward the camera. As he advances, his upper body dominates the frame, maintaining neutral eye contact against frosted trees. [78-84] He transitions to a selfie perspective, holding the camera. Snowflakes rest on his coat collar as he raises his right hand near his face with fingers spread, gazing downward and to the side while the handheld view tilts amidst the winter forest.

[84-88] A man in a red and orange plaid coat and white turtleneck holds a snow clump in his raised right hand, examining it closely. He lifts his gaze forward, mouth opening as if speaking.
[88-96] He shifts his gaze left then forward, mouth moving as if singing. The camera tilts up to the snow-laden canopy, then returns to him gazing upward with his head tilted back.
[96-100] The man, now seen in white trousers, turns to a left profile while walking. He faces the camera, lifting both cupped hands holding snow to his mouth area, tilting his head back.

A man in a red and orange plaid coat, white turtleneck, white trousers, and tan boots lowers cupped hands from his mouth, extending arms slightly while tilting his head back as the camera widens to reveal his full body on the snowy path. He lowers his arms to his sides, facing forward and gazing downward to his left while standing motionless amidst frost-covered trees. The man extends his arms outward to his sides and lifts his head to look slightly upward. He brings his arms inward, raising cupped hands toward his mouth area before lowering them while walking forward. Walking through the snowy forest, he turns his head left, gazing upward at the frost-covered trees with his right arm extending slightly outward.

A man in a red plaid coat and white trousers walks along a snowy path in a frost-covered forest. He gazes from trees to ground, raising his right hand slightly, then looks ahead swinging arms naturally. Transitioning to a selfie perspective, he extends his right arm toward the lens, turning his head left. The frame tightens on his face as he looks directly into the camera. In a close-up, he raises his right hand near his chest, mouth open. He lowers his hand while continuing to look into the lens, mouth moving as if speaking. Finally, he maintains the close-up selfie angle, looking directly at the camera with his mouth open, moving through the winter environment with blurred snow-covered trees in the background.

queries.question: What color is the turtleneck sweater worn by the man in the forest? A. Red B. Green C. White D. Blue
